designSystem.style: Soft card-based UI with violet/purple accent palette, rounded corners (18-24px), gradient hero elements, and a calm, intentional visual hierarchy. Light mode uses warm lavender backgrounds; dark mode uses deep navy-purple surfaces. Micro-interactions via press scale effects and smooth toggle animations.

screens: Home / Check-in (3-step mood + situation + time flow leading to a personalized ritual)
Active Ritual (step-by-step ritual runner with countdown timer, progress bar, and completion celebration)
Discover (category grid, featured rituals carousel, and trending rituals list)
Playbook (personal saved ritual collection with usage stats and mood insights)
Settings / Profile (theme toggle, notification preferences, streak display, and app info)
